comment: VibeID persona matrix v4. 4 axes (Mind/Craft/Arc/Flow) produce 16 codes like RTAH. v4 changes the Craft axis to derive from user message text (DESIGN vs TECHNICAL keyword shares) instead of agent tool calls (Bash+Edit vs Read+Grep ratio); the previous v3 formulation measured the agent's behaviour, not the user's. Taglines were rewritten in the same release to describe personality rather than gamified action verbs. Each persona PNG filename equals the 4-letter code + '.png' (e.g. RTAH.png). Image URL = image_base_url + '/' + code + '.png'. Both image_base_url fields are the same CDN URL by design — a relative path would be resolved to file:///C:/Users/<username>/... by some agent runtimes, leaking the username and breaking shared screenshots.

RDVL.name: Deep Sage
RDVL.tagline: Patient surface-thinker; ships polish solo, one careful release at a time.
RDVL.tagline_cn: 稳重的界面思考者,独自把每次发版打磨干净。

RDVH.name: Starborne Scholar
RDVH.tagline: Methodical surface designer who threads several conversations at once and lands them as releases.
RDVH.tagline_cn: 有节奏地打磨界面,同时驱动多条对话,稳定推动发版。

RDAL.name: Lone Architect
RDAL.tagline: Long-arc surface designer; builds quietly, one disciplined system at a time.
RDAL.tagline_cn: 长线界面规划者,独自沉静构建,一次一个完整系统。

RDAH.name: Star Architect
RDAH.tagline: Methodical surface architect coordinating multiple long-running design streams in parallel.
RDAH.tagline_cn: 有条理的界面规划者,同时推动多条长线设计赛道。

RTVL.name: Deep Captain
RTVL.tagline: Steady systems shipper; takes one technical release end-to-end, alone.
RTVL.tagline_cn: 稳健的系统发版者,独自把一次技术发布从头跑到底。

RTVH.name: Star Admiral
RTVH.tagline: Coordinates several technical release lanes at once with measured discipline.
RTVH.tagline_cn: 用稳定节奏同时调度多条技术发版赛道。

RTAL.name: Nightsmith
RTAL.tagline: Deep solo work on system internals; precise, unhurried, durable output.
RTAL.tagline_cn: 在系统内部沉静独作,精准、不慌不忙、产出耐久。

RTAH.name: Titan Builder
RTAH.tagline: Coordinated internals builder; long-running technical projects across multiple parallel streams.
RTAH.tagline_cn: 节奏稳健的内部建造者,同时推进多条长线技术工程。

EDVL.name: Lone Scout
EDVL.tagline: Curious surface investigator; explores alone, then ships what they find.
EDVL.tagline_cn: 独自探索界面细节的好奇者,把发现的东西打包发版。

EDVH.name: Swarm Scout
EDVH.tagline: Curious about every surface; runs several explorations in parallel and ships them.
EDVH.tagline_cn: 对每个界面都好奇,同时跑多条探索线,边探边发版。

EDAL.name: Lone Cartograph
EDAL.tagline: Maps the surface alone; sketches new layouts and grows them slowly.
EDAL.tagline_cn: 独自摸清界面地形,慢慢搭出新版图。

EDAH.name: Star Atlas
EDAH.tagline: Curious surface mapper; coordinates several parallel UI explorations with collaborators.
EDAH.tagline_cn: 好奇心驱动的界面探索者,与多方协作同时铺开多条线。

ETVL.name: Sparkblade
ETVL.tagline: Decisive technical operator; compresses thought into one terse move and ships solo.
ETVL.tagline_cn: 果断的技术执行者,一句话压住问题,独行节奏发版。

ETVH.name: Spark Armada
ETVH.tagline: Fast technical iteration across many parallel streams; releases come in bursts.
ETVH.tagline_cn: 在多条并行赛道上快速迭代技术,发版成串落地。

ETAL.name: Solo Forger
ETAL.tagline: Energetic solo builder; iterates fast on system internals, one feature at a time.
ETAL.tagline_cn: 充满干劲的独行建造者,在系统内部快速迭代,一次一件。

ETAH.name: Forge Commune
ETAH.tagline: Fast iterative internals builder; juggles several technical experiments at once.
ETAH.tagline_cn: 同时驾驭多个技术实验的快速迭代者,内部建造从不停手。
